seoTitle: How to Get Your Global API Key on Cloudflare
metaDescription: Find and reveal your legacy Cloudflare Global API Key from your profile settings, with a password check before it's displayed.
intro: Some older integrations and scripts still require Cloudflare's legacy Global API Key rather than a scoped token. This guide covers locating that key in your profile settings and safely revealing it.

steps.heading: Open your profile
steps.body: Click the user profile icon in the top right of your Cloudflare dashboard and select My Profile.

steps.heading: Go to API Tokens
steps.body: Navigate to the API Tokens tab from the profile sub-navigation.

steps.heading: Scroll to API Keys
steps.body: Find the API Keys section further down the page, beneath the token management grid.

steps.heading: Click View next to Global API Key
steps.body: Locate the Global API Key row and click the View button.

steps.heading: Confirm your password and copy
steps.body: Enter your account password to pass the security check, then copy the revealed alphanumeric key string securely.

faq.question: Why can't I see my Global API Key without entering my password?
faq.answer: Cloudflare requires this extra security step since the Global API Key grants full account access, making it more sensitive than a scoped token.

faq.question: Should I use the Global API Key for new integrations?
faq.answer: Scoped API Tokens are generally recommended for new integrations since they limit access; the Global API Key is mainly kept for legacy tools that specifically require it.

faq.question: What should I do if my Global API Key is exposed?
faq.answer: Roll the key immediately from the same API Keys section to generate a new one and invalidate the old one.

faq.question: Is the Global API Key the same for every domain in my account?
faq.answer: Yes, the Global API Key grants access across your entire account rather than being scoped to a single domain.
